subcodes.title: Answer to Mulla Javad-i-Qazvini
subcodes.first_line: O God! I commence this Book with Thy remembrance and praise of Thine own Self. There is no God but Thee, and none knoweth how Thou art save Thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الرحمن الرحیم. اللهم انی افتتح الکتاب بذکرک و ثنآء نفسک لا اله الا انت و لا یعلم احد کیف انت الا انت
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @God's oneness [ahadiyyih and wahidiyyih]
